text:
きみのうわさ、いろいろ聞いてるよ。
アークスとしてのセンスは抜群だって。
そういえばゼノも喜んでた。

あたしも嬉しいけど……
喜んでばっかりもいられないよね。

目標は一応、ベリーハードの
クエストをクリアすることだから
協力してね。

後輩のきみの活躍に負けないように
頑張るわ

I've been hearing lots about you, you
know. Good things, too. Especially from
Zeno. He seemed thrilled to have someone
like you around.

I'm happy, too, for sure. But we can't just go
around celebrating forever, okay?

Next up on the list is tackling some Very Hard
quests. You're down to help me out, right?

I'll do my best out there with you.
Can't have a newer ARKS like you
showing me up, now can I?
